food_preference.description: I am a pure non-vegetarian and enjoy trying different non-veg dishes.

favorite_cricketer.name: KL Rahul
favorite_cricketer.reason: I admire his adaptability. He can adjust his game according to different match situations and formats. His shot selection feels natural and practical, which makes him my favorite cricketer.

favorite_movies.name: Anbe Sivam
favorite_movies.reason: The movie touched my heart and highlighted the value of humanity.

favorite_movies.name: Interstellar
favorite_movies.reason: I enjoy how it explores black holes, time dilation, space travel, and the mysteries of the universe.
